ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the athlete */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "year" TEXT /* Academic year of the athlete (e.g., SR-4, JR-3, SO-2, FR-1) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the athlete belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the athlete */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Expected graduation year of the athlete */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major field of study of the athlete */,
  "injuries" TEXT /* Record of significant injuries the athlete has had */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Additional contact information for the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "university" TEXT /* University the team represents */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach of the team */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "home_venue" TEXT /* Name of the home venue for the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team competes in (e.g., Division I, II, III) */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team is part of */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Current ranking of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach manages */,
  "years_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the coach has been coaching */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Special areas of expertise of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the competition */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue of the competition */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Organizer of the competition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the competition */,
  "num_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the competition */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the competition */,
  "course_length" REAL /* Length of the course in kilometers */,
  "sponsor" TEXT /* Sponsor of the competition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Placement of the athlete in the competition */,
  "avg_mile" TEXT /* Average mile time of the athlete */,
  "time" TEXT /* Total time of the athlete in the competition */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the athlete in the competition */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the result */,
  "split_times" TEXT /* Split times at various checkpoints */,
  "personal_best" INTEGER /* Indicates if the result was a personal best for the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, athlete) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user is associated with */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_compositions" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team composition */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the team composition */,
  "athlete_ids" TEXT /* List of athlete IDs in the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach of the team */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the team composition (e.g., Fall 2023, Spring 2024) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_compositions_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_compositions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_compositions_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., avg_mile, time) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., minutes, seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team performance */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "total_score" INTEGER /* Total score of the team in the competition */,
  "team_place" INTEGER /* Placement of the team in the competition */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance */,
  "best_athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the best performing athlete in the competition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_best_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("best_athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)
